segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: Evening. What brings you to the United States?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I just got in from Seoul. I'm starting a PhD program in architecture here in Boston.

segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: Which school will you be attending?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I'll be studying at my university in Boston. I have my admission documents here if you need them.

segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: How long do you expect to stay?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: The program should take about four to five years.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I booked a temporary place for the first couple of weeks while I get settled. After that, I'll move into long-term housing.

segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: And how will you support yourself?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Through school funding and personal savings. I can show the paperwork if you'd like.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thank you. Have a good night.
